seo.homeDescription: Sonopilot helps emerging artists break through the noise — real feedback, meaningful engagement, one hub to steer your music career.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: Sign-up and app access will open soon. Thanks for your patience — we're finishing Sonopilot for you.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Connect your platforms, set your preferences, explore your scene — in three steps. Everything lives in one dashboard.
howItWorks.closingP1: Reach the artists and listeners who matter — grow a community around your music, at your pace.
howItWorks.closingP2: Sonopilot frees up time for what counts: creating, connecting, collaborating.

steps.title: Connect your networks
steps.description: Secure one-click linking, disconnect anytime. SoundCloud is live today — more platforms are on the way.

steps.title: Define your world
steps.description: Pick your genres, discovery preferences, and what you care about — all from a single tab.

steps.title: Explore and engage
steps.description: Browse profiles and tracks that fit your sound. Listen, follow, like, comment — every action stays yours.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.metaDescription: Publisher and hosting information for the Sonopilot website.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: How Sonopilot processes personal data on this website.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the Sonopilot website.
